headline: Our Innodata Stock Pick Smashed Earnings Expectations. Stay Long.
summary: Innodata  is one stock clearly in the winners’ column.  Shares of the data engineering company skyrocketed 80% today on record setting quarterly results.  Ridgefield Park, N.J.-based Innodata focuses on delivering annotated and curated data required to train and refine advanced AI models.
